## What's Changed

Updates ESPHome build to 2026.03.2 for some memory leak and UART fixes. 

https://github.com/esphome/esphome/releases/tag/2026.3.2
https://github.com/esphome/esphome/releases/tag/2026.3.1

Includes custom URL option for a link to GBL firmware for efr32 MG24 coordinators. 

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/tube0013/TubesZB-ESPHome-Builder/compare/2025.10.27.2_redo4...2026.03.28_Release
